headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays edged the Detroit Tigers in a thrilling 2-1 victory, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 10-run victory behind Keibert Ruiz's 3-hit, 5-RBI performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Jack Dreyer of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who was placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder discomfort. Other players on the injured list include Hunter Harvey of the Chicago Cubs, Ty Madden of the Detroit Tigers, Ryan O'Hearn of the Pittsburgh Pirates, Jose Trevino of the Cincinnati Reds, Tommy Nance of the Toronto Blue Jays, Jake Fraley of the Tampa Bay Rays, and Heliot Ramos of the San Francisco Giants.

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a trade for cash. The Chicago White Sox acquired Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-hander Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams and traded Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 10-run victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with several players making notable contributions. Xavier Edwards, Otto Lopez, and Yandy Díaz were among the impact hitters for the Marlins, while Jake Fraley was an impact hitter for the Rays.

top_news.title: **Phillies Shut Out Pirates 6-0**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 6-0 victory. Impact players for the Phillies included Bryce Harper, Alec Bohm, and Bryson Stott, while Zack Wheeler and Paul Skenes led the pitching effort.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Place LHP Jack Dreyer on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers left-handed pitcher Jack Dreyer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder discomfort. The move was made on May 17, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire LHP Eric Lauer in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer in a trade. Lauer joins the Dodgers after being traded from the Toronto Blue Jays.
